name: Solana Wallet PnL Analyzer
tagline: Check any Solana wallet's win rate, PnL, and copy-trade rating instantly
description: Analyze any Solana wallet's recent swap history to determine if it's worth copy-trading. Returns win rate, realized PnL in SOL, trader classification (WHALE/DEGEN/TRADER/HOLDER), copy rating (FOLLOW/NEUTRAL/AVOID), top traded tokens with per-token PnL, and recent trade history. Built for copy traders and smart money followers who need fast, reliable wallet analysis.
